variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17481 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17481 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17481 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P959052 Air Filter, Safety Obround | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17481
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P959052 Air Filter, Safety Obround is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter CF 2631 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17481
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4457 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17481
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF4457 axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
